info.name: LinkedIn Sales Navigator API
info.description:
API for accessing LinkedIn Sales Navigator features including sales contracts, analytics export jobs, access tokens, profile associations, and CRM data validation.

Contact Support:
 Name: LinkedIn API Support

item.name: LinkedIn Find All Contracts Where User Has Active Seat

query.description: (Required) Query parameter to fetch contracts for the member

request.description: Retrieve all Sales Navigator contracts where the authenticated user has an active seat.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
